conversation.text: Hiii, so I saw your website and honestly it looks really interesting, we've been struggling with our leads for ages haha
haha yeah it's one of those things that sneaks up on you. what kind of business are you guys running?
We're a boutique design agency. We love our clients but the admin is killing us!
oh nice, boutique agencies have the best vibes but yeah the back-and-forth on enquiries is a nightmare. basically kills your creative flow right?
EXACTLY. I spend more time on WhatsApp than in Figma lately.

haha been there. yeah so the agent basically handles all that for you. catches the lead, figures out if they're a fit, and books them in so you only talk to people who are ready to start|||it's like having a project manager that never sleeps. worth a quick 20 min chat with Louis to see how it looks for agencies?
OMG yes please. Send the link!
